## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest meaningful change made to address it.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Maintenance or refactor
- [ ] Documentation or governance
- [ ] CI, packaging, or release
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Security-sensitive change (details have been coordinated privately)

## Validation

List the exact commands and manual scenarios run, including platforms. Explain skipped checks.

```text
npm test
npm run check
npm run lint
npm run format
npm run build
```

## Risk and compatibility

Describe data migration, protocol, privacy, permissions, platform, dependency, generated-file, or rollback implications. Write “none identified” only after considering them.

## Visual changes

Add before/after screenshots or state “not applicable.” Remove private calendar, identity, invite, and key material.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and excludes unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] Tests or verification cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] User and maintainer documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private keys, invite codes, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Generated mobile files and lockfiles changed only when required by this pull request.
- [ ] Security limitations and release-readiness claims have not been overstated.
